items.title: [正面] A charming and relaxing town sim with a focus on c...
items.summary: A charming and relaxing town sim with a focus on crafting and exploration. The resource gathering is engaging, and the progression feels rewarding without being overly grindy. It's a solid, enjoyable experience if you are looking for something cozy to unwind with.

items.title: [正面] Gostei da gameplay de combate usando cartas e o ga...
items.summary: Gostei da gameplay de combate usando cartas e o gacha não me pareceu predatório mas sim bem f2p-friendly. Porém, é muito difícil acompanhar e emergir na história por conta da tradução horrível de IA e também por algum motivo quando o texto é "grande" ele corta e tem que ficar acessando o LOG para ler. Se for só para fazer combos de cartinhas, recomendo muito, mas se for querer ler a história, desista, não dá.

items.title: [正面] It's a fun gacha card battle game. there is no rea...
items.summary: It's a fun gacha card battle game. there is no real deck building. Every character has your basic strike/defend cards, and then 3 or 4 special cards. You can alter them while you are on a mission every time you complete a a battle youll have an option to attach a random effect to your choice of three cards. Overall it is a fun game, if you like card battlers and gacha elements. The GPT english translation is not unbearable, yes it does make some of the effects in game read weird but it takes about 30 seconds to figure out what it does.
